//: Phase R7 — wrangler-pages-deploy bundles `functions/` with esbuild, which walks up to find the nearest tsconfig. The root tsconfig targets ES2017 (intentional — Next.js + older Safari compatibility) but ES2017 can't transpile async generator functions like `async function* iterateTokens()` in workers-ai.ts. Pages Functions run on Cloudflare Workers (V8 only, modern), so we override target locally to ES2022 for this directory only. Root config is excluded from this path via its own `exclude: ["functions"]`, so this file is the sole source of truth for the Pages Functions bundle.
